constructs.instructions_verbatim: The purpose of this experiment is to rate words as to the ease with which a human body can physically interact with what they represent... Your body-object interaction ratings will be made on a 1 to 7 scale. A value of 1 will indicate a low body-object interaction rating, and a value of 7 will indicate a high body-object interaction rating.
constructs.citation: Pexman, P. M., Muraki, E., Sidhu, D. M., Siakaluk, P. D., & Yap, M. J. (2019). Quantifying sensorimotor experience: Body-object interaction ratings for more than 9,000 English words. Behavior Research Methods, 51, 453-466.
constructs.instructions_llm: Rate how easily a human body can physically interact with what this word refers to. Range: 1-7 (1 = low interaction, 7 = high interaction). Reply with one number.
